omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We use device-specific information (such as your hardware manufacturer & model, operating system version, screen size, CPU model, mobile network information and installed apps) to implement app features, provide our services, and improve the app performance for all our users.
We use the Replicate server to process facial data. We will save the user's facial image on our own Google server and also upload it to the Replicate server.

For some apps using account system like KeepSafe, If you want to delete your account data, you can go to step "Me Page -> Settings(or click Setting button) -> Log out" to leave our app. Then you can contact us by email(you must provide your Facebook email or the email you have bind to our apps, which for us to find your account), we will help you delete your account data stored in our apps.
